name: Shirley MacLaine
abstract: Shirley MacLaine (born Shirley MacLean Beaty; April 24, 1934) is an American actress and author. With a career spanning over 70 years, she has received numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, an Emmy Award, two BAFTA Awards, six Golden Globe Awards, two Volpi Cups, and two Silver Bears.

works.t: Let Me Sing and I'm Happy

concerts.label: Benefit: American Foundation for AIDS Research

about_quotes.speaker: Luther Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: Shirley MacLaine had already taken over the part because Carol had broken or strained her ankle or something.
